headline: Built for Cognism
subheadline: Enhance AI-driven lead prospecting and data enrichment to support your sales intelligence platform for 549 employees

challenges.title: Funding Uncertainty
challenges.desc: The cancelled VC deal limits cash flow for Cognism. This slows new feature development. It forces strategic shifts to maintain revenue growth.

challenges.title: Lead Prospecting Scale
challenges.desc: Scaling prospecting for 549 employees requires robust AI tools. Inaccurate data hampers lead quality. Competition demands faster innovation.

challenges.title: Data Compliance Issues
challenges.desc: Global operations at Cognism face varying regulations. Non-compliance risks fines and trust. Data enrichment processes must adapt quickly.

challenges.title: Revenue Growth Pressures
challenges.desc: Hitting $83M revenue means sustaining customer acquisition. Economic shifts affect sales intelligence demand. Internal teams need better tools to adapt.

deliverables.title: AI Prospecting System
deliverables.desc: Builds an AI system for lead generation that integrates with Cognism's CRM to enrich data in real-time

deliverables.title: Data Enrichment Framework
deliverables.desc: Creates a framework for AI-driven data enrichment that connects with HubSpot for seamless syncing and trend analysis

deliverables.title: Compliance Toolset
deliverables.desc: Develops tools to ensure data compliance in sales operations, integrating with existing platforms to mitigate regulatory risks

deliverables.title: Sales Analytics Dashboard
deliverables.desc: Constructs a dashboard for visualizing customer trends, integrating with Cognism's infrastructure to boost revenue decisions

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Review Cognism's current sales infrastructure and identify pain points

engagementSteps.title: Design and Build
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Develop AI systems and integrate them with existing tools

engagementSteps.title: Deployment
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Launch the infrastructure and optimize based on initial performance data

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It uses AI to improve lead prospecting and data enrichment for B2B SaaS.

faqItems.question: How does it help Cognism?
faqItems.answer: It scales lead generation and ensures data compliance for your sales platform.

faqItems.question: What are the implementation costs?
faqItems.answer: Costs depend on scope and are tailored to Cognism's needs.

faqItems.question: How long will it take?
faqItems.answer: Typically three months for full deployment.

faqItems.question: Is it compatible with our tools?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it integrates with HubSpot and other Cognism systems.

faqItems.question: Who manages the project?
faqItems.answer: A team with B2B SaaS experience handles the work.

stackItems.name: HubSpot
stackItems.role: Handles CRM integration for sales data syncing

stackItems.name: Zendesk
stackItems.role: Manages customer support and ticketing systems

stackItems.name: Pardot
stackItems.role: Supports marketing automation for lead nurturing

stackItems.name: AI/ML Tools
stackItems.role: Enables data enrichment and predictive analytics

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Provides alternative CRM options for sales operations
